<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Okitsushima-jinja]][[ja:奥津嶋神社]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|奥津嶋神社}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Okitsushima Shinto Shrine
| native_name = 奥津嶋神社
| image = Okitusima jinja.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Okitsushima Shinto Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|35.200479|136.054447}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Three Goddesses of Munakata|lt=Three Goddesses of Munakata|ja|宗像三女神|ko|무나카타 삼여신|simple|Three Munakata goddesses|zh|宗像三女神|WD=Q10948069}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Okitsushima Shinto Shrine'''|奥津嶋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Myojin Taisha|lt=Myōjin Taisha|en|Myojin Taisha|fr|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|WD=Q9610964}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181819</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181819</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1278
* {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|WD=Q11071125}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181819</ref>
* {{ill|Q135206474|lt=Q135206474|WD=Q135206474}}
* {{ill|Q135206467|lt=Q135206467|WD=Q135206467}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11638477}}
** Series ordinal: 39
** P155: {{ill|Umamioka Watamuki Shrine|lt=Umamioka Watamuki Shrine|ja|馬見岡綿向神社|WD=Q24865035}}
** P156: {{ill|Oka Shrine|lt=Oka Shrine|ja|乎加神社|WD=Q11369798}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Ōmihachiman|lt=Omihachiman|ar|أوميهاتشيمان (شيغا)|azb|اومیهاچیمان، شیقا|ceb|Ōmihachiman-shi (distrito sa Hapon)|ce|Омихатиман|de|Ōmihachiman|en|Ōmihachiman|envoyage|Omihachiman|es|Ōmihachiman|fa|اومیهاچیمان، شیگا|fi|Ōmi-Hachiman|fr|Ōmihachiman|gl|Ōmihachiman|hy|Օմիհատիման|id|Ōmihachiman, Shiga|it|Ōmihachiman|ja|近江八幡市|ko|오미하치만시|mg|Ōmihachiman|ms|Ōmihachiman|mzn|اومیهاچیمان، شیگا|nl|Omihachiman|pl|Ōmihachiman|pt|Omihachiman|ro|Ōmihachiman|ru|Омихатиман|simple|Ōmihachiman|sv|Ōmihachiman|tg|Оумиҳачиман|tl|Ōmihachiman|tr|Ōmihachiman|tt|Омихатиман|tum|Ōmihachiman|uk|Омі-Хачіман|vi|Ōmihachiman, Shiga|war|Ōmihachiman, Shiga|zh-classical|近江八幡市|zh_min_nan|Ômihatiman-chhī|zh_yue|近江八幡|zh|近江八幡市|WD=Q385461}}
* {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|WD=Q843882}}
* {{ill|Gamō District, Shiga|lt=Gamo district|ceb|Gamō-gun|en|Gamō District, Shiga|es|Distrito de Gamō (Shiga)|fa|شهرستان گامو، شیگا|fr|District de Gamō|hu|Gamó körzet|id|Distrik Gamō, Shiga|it|Distretto di Gamō|ja|蒲生郡|ko|가모군 (시가현)|ms|Daerah Gamō, Shiga|pl|Powiat Gamō|ru|Гамо|zh|蒲生郡|WD=Q931658}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.200479|136.054447}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181819</ref>

== image (P18) ==

* Okitusima jinja.jpg

== described by source (P1343) ==

* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|WD=Q135037878}}
** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20060723183752/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/210704.html

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181819
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}

== architectural style (P149) ==

* {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|WD=Q210684}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 1160005006959

== Commons category (P373) ==

* Okitsushima-jinja

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}}
* {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181819</ref>
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}

==References==

[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]]

{{commons category|Okitsushima-jinja}}
[[JA:奥津嶋神社]]

{{wikidata link|Q11445964}}
[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]]
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|奥津嶋神社|version=107295159|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 奥津嶋神社
|画像   = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]<br />本殿（左奥）と拝殿
|所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188
|位置   = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}}
|社格   = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社<br/>旧{{jalink|村社}}
|創建   = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）
|本殿   = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}}
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}}
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}}
}}
'''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社}}。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|奥津島比売命}}

== 神紋 ==
笹竜胆

== 由緒 ==
{{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる<ref>通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。</ref>。

== 祭り ==
* 例祭
:5月8日に行われる。

== 境内社 ==
* 厳島神社
* 山神神社

== 文化財等 ==
* 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記
* 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年）

== 脚注 ==
{{reflist}}

== 外部リンク ==
* [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁）
{{神道 横}}
{{Shinto-stub}}

==End Japanese==
[[Category:滋賀県の神社]]
[[Category:名神大社]]
[[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]]
[[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
[[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]]
[[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
